content:
✨ socktop | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Remote system monitoring with a user-friendly TUI.
✨ Key Features: • Remote monitoring via WebSocket (JSON over WS) • Optional WSS (TLS) with client certificate pinning • TUI built with ratatui • Detailed CPU, Memory, Swap, Disk, Network, and Temperature metrics • Sortable process table with scrollbars
📖 Summary: Socktop is a remote system monitoring tool that provides a rich TUI interface, inspired by `top` and `btop`. It communicates with a lightweight agent over WebSockets, offering detailed system metrics and process information.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
